---
title: "Page not found"
description: "This page does not exist or has moved."
toc: false
---

The page you were looking for does not exist or has moved.

Here are some useful places to continue:

- [Home](/index.qmd)
- [Research](/research.qmd)
- [Teaching](/teaching.qmd)
- [Blog](/blog/index.qmd)
- [Contact](/contact.qmd)

If you followed a link from another site and ended up here, I would
appreciate a short note at
[gonzalo.llamosas@uma.es](mailto:gonzalo.llamosas@uma.es) so I can fix it.
